title: LAIF Verified Corpus Manifest Schema
description: Provenance metadata schema for documents in the LAIF verified corpus. Every document ingested into docs/verified/ requires a manifest conforming to this schema.

document_id.description: Unique identifier for this document within the LAIF corpus. Convention: <8-char-hash>-<ShortTitle>.

title.description: Full official title of the document as it appears in the authoritative publication.

jurisdiction.description: Legal or institutional jurisdiction of the document.

descriptions.binding_regulation: Legally binding regulation with direct effect (e.g. EU AI Act)
descriptions.executive_directive: Executive order or equivalent directive — binding on executive agencies, not private actors
descriptions.voluntary_framework: Non-binding framework adopted by voluntary agreement or practice
descriptions.international_recommendation: OECD-type recommendation — non-binding, adopted by member state consensus
descriptions.procurement_standard: Standard enforced through procurement gating rather than statute

authoritative_url.description: Canonical URL of the authoritative publication. Use the official government or international body URL. If unknown, set to null and document in provenance_notes.

retrieval_date_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the document was retrieved. Set to 'NOT_RETRIEVED_FROM_URL' if sourced from a user-supplied file rather than a URL fetch.

retrieval_method.description: How the document was obtained. 'strict_source_mode' variants indicate no training-derived content was used.

publication_date.description: Official publication date of the document. ISO 8601 format preferred; year-only acceptable if month/day unavailable.

version_identifier.description: Official version, edition, or instrument number as it appears in the publication.

sha256_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the raw file stored in docs/verified/raw/. This is the hash of the extracted markdown, not necessarily the original source file. Document any difference in provenance_notes.

raw_filename.description: Filename of the document in docs/verified/raw/. Must exist and hash must match sha256_hash.

extraction_boundaries.description: Documents the scope of text extracted and used in assessment.

full_document.description: True if the entire document was ingested.

sections.description: If partial extraction, list section identifiers included.

notes.description: Any additional notes on extraction scope.

descriptions.RAW_VERBATIM: Text is byte-for-byte identical to the source, no transformation applied.
descriptions.STRUCTURALLY_EXTRACTED: Text extracted from a structured source (PDF, DOCX) with structure-aware tooling; content is verbatim but format has been normalised from the source encoding.
descriptions.NORMALISED_FORMATTING_ONLY: Text is verbatim with only markdown heading levels, pipe tables, or whitespace normalised. No content words altered.

descriptions.PRIMARY_CITABLE: Text is verbatim from the authoritative source and may be cited as primary evidence. Requires NORMALISED_FORMATTING_ONLY or RAW_VERBATIM transformation_status.
descriptions.DERIVED_EXCERPT: Text is a structured extract that preserves substance but may not be verbatim in every detail. Cite with caveat.
descriptions.NON_CITABLE: Text is a paraphrase, summary, or otherwise not suitable for primary citation.

descriptions.AUTHORITATIVE_PRIMARY_SOURCE: The document is itself the authoritative governance instrument (e.g. an international recommendation, regulation, or standard).
descriptions.AUTHORITATIVE_GOVERNMENT_PUBLICATION: The document is an official government publication constituting the operative legal or policy instrument.
descriptions.REGULATORY_PUBLICATION: The document is a regulatory or standards body publication operative within its defined scope.

descriptions.ASSESSED: A full LAIF v1.2 assessment has been completed and is recorded in reports/laif_full_assessment.md.
descriptions.PENDING_ASSESSMENT: Document is ingested but full assessment not yet completed.
descriptions.PENDING_INGESTION: Document has not yet been ingested; manifest entry is a placeholder recording intent. When verification_status=PENDING_INGESTION and no source has yet been acquired, acquisition-source fields may remain null or empty until acquisition occurs.

provenance_notes.description: Optional. Any additional provenance context, limitations, or caveats not captured by other fields.

assessment_reference.description: Optional. Location of the LAIF assessment for this document (e.g. 'reports/laif_full_assessment.md — Assessment 1').

acquisition_channel.description: How the authoritative source file entered the repository. The channel documents custody only; it does not itself prove authority. For verification_status=PENDING_INGESTION with no source yet acquired, this field may be null or empty until acquisition occurs.

descriptions.AUTOMATED_URL_RETRIEVAL: Tooling fetched the source directly from the recorded authoritative origin URL.
descriptions.HUMAN_GITHUB_DEPOSIT: A human downloaded the authoritative source and deposited it into docs/verified/manual_ingest/ through GitHub or a Git commit.
descriptions.HUMAN_SESSION_UPLOAD: A human supplied the authoritative source file through the active session, and the agent wrote the exact supplied file into docs/verified/manual_ingest/.

authoritative_origin_url.description: Canonical official URL from which the source is asserted to originate. This duplicates or supersedes authoritative_url for acquisition-channel provenance. For verification_status=PENDING_INGESTION with no source yet acquired, this acquisition-source field may be null or empty until acquisition occurs.

acquired_by.description: Actor or process that acquired the source file, e.g. automated_tooling, human_maintainer, session_upload_operator. For verification_status=PENDING_INGESTION with no source yet acquired, this field may be null or empty until acquisition occurs.

acquired_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of acquisition, or NOT_ACQUIRED for pending documents.

acquisition_note.description: Plain-language custody note. Must state whether authority was automated-verified, human-attested, or pending due to network blocking.

source_file_sha256.description: SHA256 hash of the originally acquired source file before extraction/transformation. If unavailable for legacy ingestions, set null and explain in acquisition_note/provenance_notes. For verification_status=PENDING_INGESTION with no source yet acquired, this acquisition-source field may be null or empty until acquisition occurs.

transformation_chain.description: Ordered list of transformations from acquired source file to docs/verified/raw markdown. Each step must be content-preserving or explicitly downgrade citation_status. For verification_status=PENDING_INGESTION with no source yet acquired, this acquisition-source field may be null or empty until acquisition occurs.

verification_status.description: Current authority/equivalence verification state. This is separate from acquisition_channel.

descriptions.AUTOMATED_VERIFIED: Automated retrieval from authoritative_origin_url succeeded and local source equivalence was verified.
descriptions.HUMAN_ATTESTED_AUTHORITATIVE: Human operator supplied the file and asserted it came from the authoritative source.
descriptions.NETWORK_BLOCKED_PENDING_HUMAN_SOURCE: Automated retrieval was blocked; this is a non-terminal state pending lawful human source acquisition.
descriptions.HASH_VERIFIED_LOCAL_ONLY: Repository integrity is verified by local hash, but upstream URL equivalence is not yet proven.
descriptions.REJECTED_UNVERIFIED: Source is not accepted for authoritative assessment.

network_status.description: Optional structured network retrieval state for the authoritative_origin_url, e.g. AUTOMATED_URL_BLOCKED_HTTP_403 or NOT_ATTEMPTED.

validation_rules: citation_status == PRIMARY_CITABLE requires transformation_status in [RAW_VERBATIM, NORMALISED_FORMATTING_ONLY]
assessment_status == ASSESSED requires assessment_reference to be non-null
sha256_hash must match SHA256 of the file at docs/verified/raw/{raw_filename} when verified

assessment_status == PENDING_INGESTION: sha256_hash, raw_filename, extraction_boundaries, transformation_status may be null; when verification_status=PENDING_INGESTION and no source has yet been acquired, acquisition-source fields may also be null or empty
acquisition_channel must be one of AUTOMATED_URL_RETRIEVAL, HUMAN_GITHUB_DEPOSIT, HUMAN_SESSION_UPLOAD
verification_status must be one of AUTOMATED_VERIFIED, HUMAN_ATTESTED_AUTHORITATIVE, NETWORK_BLOCKED_PENDING_HUMAN_SOURCE, HASH_VERIFIED_LOCAL_ONLY, REJECTED_UNVERIFIED
HUMAN_ATTESTED_AUTHORITATIVE means the human operator supplied the file and asserted it came from the authoritative source; it is not byte-equivalence proof by itself
HASH_VERIFIED_LOCAL_ONLY means repository integrity is verified, but upstream URL equivalence is not yet proven
NETWORK_BLOCKED_PENDING_HUMAN_SOURCE is non-terminal and requires manual acquisition or later automated verification
transformation_chain must document every extraction/normalisation step from acquired source to raw markdown
